title: Vivi Faces the Warlord
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on vivi faces the warlord, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Faces the Warlord. Crocodile uses Rain Dinners and Baroque Works to capture his enemies and reveal the shape of Operation Utopia. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Why does a bird have a Gatling gun!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's been a while, hasn't it, Princess Vivi?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Please wait here for a short moment.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The strong- EST Warrior in ALA- Basta!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: One of the 5 identified devil fruit types which gives the user the ability to fly...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Thank god for Poll! Now I have to hurry and meet up with the others...!

summary: This part develops vivi faces the warlord and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
